JUDGE PRO TEM: JAMES P. GREEN; CLERK: MARIA SANCHEZ; COURT REPORTER NOT NEEDED. PLTF OFFERED $8000.00 INCLUDING RENT WAIVER TO 1/31/00 - DEFT ASKED FOR 48 HRS TO CONSIDER. DEFT NORDENSTROM NOT PRESENT. PLTF MOVED P.J. TO STRIKE AT ISSUE. COUNSEL ADVISED THAT THIS WAS LEFT TO SETTLEMENT JUDGE. AFTER CONSIDERATION, JURY DEMAND BY NORDENSTROM IS STRIKEN BECAUSE NO GOOD CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR, AN ADVISE OR COUNSEL. SEND ORDER TO WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO NORDENSTROM TO SHOW CAUSE FOR DETERMINATION BY TRIAL JUDGE.
